categories.name: Yoink.fun Launchpad

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Meme

categories.name: Time.fun Ecosystem
categories.content: Time.fun Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via time.fun.

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: Nest Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens representing permissionless and non-custodial deposits into curated Real-World Asset (RWA) vaults on the Nest protocol.

categories.name: Wrapped-Tokens
categories.content: Wrapped tokens offer a way to circumvent the lack of interoperability between different blockchains. The wrapping of a token happens when the original asset is put into a “wrapper” and deployed on a different blockchain. With it being wrapped, the cryptocurrency can now be used on a blockchain where it previously wasn’t available. One example of a wrapped token would be Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC). It is an ERC-20 version of Bitcoin, which allows it to be used on protocols based on Ethereum. Watch this video to learn more about Wrapped tokens.

categories.name: Tokenized Money Market Fund (MMFs)
categories.content: Tokens that represent shares or units (1:1) of a regulated money market fund, issued or recorded on-chain by a regulated entity. The token is yield-bearing, passing through the fund's NAV and returns via accumulating or distributing share classes.

categories.name: Sun Pump Ecosystem
categories.content: Sun Pump Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via sunpump.meme.

categories.name: Camelot Launchpad
categories.content: Camelot Launchpad is a platform for crypto projects to hold Initial DEX Offerings (IDOs). Participants are able to gain early access to public and special token sales on the platform.

categories.name: Aave Tokens
categories.content: Aave Tokens are balance tokens on the Aave Protocol which represents a lending balance on the Aave money market.

categories.name: DaoMaker Launchpad
categories.content: DaoMaker Launchpad is a platform for crypto projects to hold Initial DEX Offerings (IDOs). Participants are able to gain early access to public and special token sales on the platform.

categories.name: Sticker-Themed Coins
categories.content: Meme coins inspired by Telegram Sticker Packs

categories.name: Arcade Games
categories.content: Classic-style games with simple mechanics, high replayability, and score-based progression.

categories.name: Backpack Securities Ecosystem
categories.content: Backpack Securities is a platform by Backpack that allows users to trade real U.S. stocks through traditional brokerage infrastructure and convert them into tokenized securities on Solana for 24/7 DeFi-compatible trading.

categories.name: Moonshot Ecosystem
categories.content: Moonshot Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via https://moonshot.money/.

categories.name: Hybrid Token Standards
categories.content: Hybrid Token Standards allow tokens to have characteristics of both fungible assets and non-fungible tokens.

categories.name: bStocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized representations of U.S.-listed stocks and ETFs issued by BTech Holdings Limited, a Binance Group affiliate structured as a Special Purpose Vehicle in the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

categories.name: TikTok Meme
categories.content: TikTok Meme Coins are tokens inspired by viral TikTok trends.

categories.name: Telegram Apps
categories.content: Applications built on the Telegram platform that integrate cryptocurrency or blockchain technology.
